content_body: We loved everything about our cabin. The remote location and awesome views was perfect for us. We could have really never left the cabin as it was awesome. It felt very homey and comfortable with plenty of space to relax. When we first arrived after a long drive we were a little apprehensive driving up the mountain but as the week went on we didn’t mind it at all and it really wasn’t that long of a drive into Blue Ridge. The town has everything you could want. The area is beautiful and the people are very friendly. We were there in the summer and found the weather quite pleasant, not too hot and humidity was lower than expected.
title: We Loved Everything!
